html:
Exclusive to:

The Rudder is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be placed on a Boat. It can be used to rotate a Boat around its axis, both port and starboard. Unlike the Steering Wheel, the Rudder does not affect the trajectory of the Boat, as it does not turn the Mast.

Rudder Kit

The Rudder Kit is a craftable Item in the seafaring filter exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It creates a Rudder when placed on a Boat.

Gallery

  • Concept art of the Rudder shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
  • Concept art of the Rudder shown in Rhymes With Play stream.
StructuresCraftable Items

DSTDSRoGSWHam

DSTDSRoGSWHam
plainText:
Exclusive to:
Rudder
Miscellaneous
"boat_rotator"
“Things are going in the right direction. Or maybe the left.”
–Wilson
“Hehehe, let's see how fast we can spin without getting sick!”
–Willow
“Is little turny lever.”
–Wolfgang
“If only I could turn everything around so easily.”
–Wendy
“BOAT ROTATION ENABLED”
–WX-78
“It allows me to rotate the deck, while maintaining our heading.”
–Wickerbottom
“Just gotta pick one way or the other, nice and simple.”
–Woodie
“If I hear one word of complaint, I'm turning this boat around.”
–Maxwell
“The most nimble vessel is often the victor in battle.”
–Wigfrid
“We can turn the boat like a merry-go-round!”
–Webber
“It might be about time to turn it over.”
–Warly
“Wee! Floaty go spinny!”
–Wormwood
“Controllin' the boat rotation is mighty useful.”
–Winona
“One good turn deserves another, hyuyu!”
–Wortox
“Wanna make boat spin faster! Faster!!”
–Wurt
“Rudders are very important for sailing!”
–Walter
“Clockwise or counter-clockwise?”
–Wanda
The Rudder is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be placed on a Boat.
It can be used to rotate a Boat around its axis, both port and starboard.
Unlike the Steering Wheel, the Rudder does not affect the trajectory of the Boat, as it does not turn the Mast.
Rudder Kit[edit | edit source]
Rudder
"Row, row, rotate your boat."
Object Info
3 min.
Can be Burned
Does not stack
Crafting
×2 ×1 ×1
Filters
Tier
Miscellaneous
"boat_rotator_kit"
“I think I'll take it out for a spin.”
–Wilson
“Fiiiine, I'll put the stupid rudder on the stupid boat.”
–Willow
“Will make boat extra turny, yes?”
–Wolfgang
“I could build a rudder, I suppose...”
–Wendy
“FOR BUILDING A STUPID RUDDER”
–WX-78
“It should improve the boat's maneuverability.”
–Wickerbottom
“Better get it set up on the boat, eh?”
–Woodie
“Do I look like a common shipwright? Oh, very well...”
–Maxwell
“It shall be done, with haste!”
–Wigfrid
“We're good at spinning things!”
–Webber
“Aha! I thought my boat was missing something!”
–Warly
“Can make the Floaty spin with this”
–Wormwood
“Time to put this doo-hickey to the test.”
–Winona
“It's something or rudder!”
–Wortox
“It boat stuff.”
–Wurt
“A rudder might come in handy.”
–Walter
“I can't believe I didn't think of it sooner.”
–Wanda
The Rudder Kit is a craftable Item in the seafaring filter exclusive to Don't Starve Together introduced in The Curse of Moon Quay update. It creates a Rudder when placed on a Boat.

The '''Rudder''' is a structure exclusive to Don't Starve Together. It can be placed on a Boat.
It can be used to rotate a Boat around its axis, both port and starboard.
Unlike the [[Steering Wheel Kit|Steering Wheel]], the Rudder does not affect the trajectory of the Boat, as it does not turn the [[Mast]].
{{Clear}}
